mood: Elegant, Mystical, Premium, Authoritative, Indian/Vedic Heritage

accent.usage: For dates, numerology digits, overlines, and labels

layout_spacing.grid_strategy: Bento Grid (Mode A: Tetris) for services to create visual tension and asymmetry. Use gap-8 to gap-12.

surface_strategies.cards: Glassmorphism (Crystal Variant). Background: bg-[#1A0B2E]/40. Blur: backdrop-blur-xl. Border: 1px solid border-[#D4AF37]/20. Shadow: soft diffuse shadow-lg.
surface_strategies.buttons: Solid gold (#D4AF37) with dark aubergine text (#0F0518) for primary CTA. Subtle hover lift (-translate-y-1) and glow (shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.4)]).
surface_strategies.header: Sticky Crystal Glass. bg-[#0F0518]/70 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#D4AF37]/10.

hero.layout: Full viewport height (min-h-screen). Immersive background image with heavy gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-b from-[#0F0518]/80 via-[#0F0518]/40 to-[#0F0518]) to ensure text contrast.
hero.content: Centered elegant typography. Sacred geometry logo concept on top.

services.layout: 4 cards using asymmetrical bento grid. Each card represents a service (Mobile Numerology, Name Numerology, Vastu Consultation, Business Name Correction). Include subtle gold icons (Lucide icons: Hash, Compass, Briefcase, User).

about.layout: Two-column staggered layout. Large portrait image (optical alignment, slightly overlapping the container) on left. Typography-driven storytelling on right.

contact.functionality: Form with Name and Mobile Number inputs. Submit button triggers WhatsApp link: https://wa.me/919929059153?text=Hi%20Newalkkarsaandiip,%20I%20would%20like%20to%20book%20a%20consultation.%20My%20name%20is%20[Name]%20and%20mobile%20is%20[Number].
contact.design: Clean Shadcn inputs customized with gold focus rings and glassmorphic container.

hero_background.description: Abstract golden geometric shapes on black background, representing cosmic geometry.

consultant_portrait.description: Elegant professional consultant portrait for the About section.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All service cards must lift (-translate-y-2) and increase border opacity on hover. Transitions must be smooth (duration-300 ease-out).
motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveal: Use framer-motion for staggered fade-up reveals of grid items and sections as they enter the viewport.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark aubergine (#0F0518) and classic gold (#D4AF37) palette. Do not introduce generic tech blues or grays.
For the logo, if no image is available, construct a CSS/SVG-based sacred geometry symbol (like overlapping triangles or a minimalist Sri Yantra) using gold strokes.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the marketing layout, avoiding generic Shadcn card wrappers for main sections to ensure custom, overlapping bento layouts.
Form inputs must use Shadcn customized to match the dark theme (transparent bg, gold borders on focus).
Implement the WhatsApp redirect carefully on the client side upon form submission.
Include data-testid attributes for all interactive elements.
